title: LootBeamsFabric
description: A Minecraft Fabric mod that adds colorful and customizable loot beams to dropped items!
body:
## Notice
Please use [LootBeams Fabric Updated](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootbeamsfabricupdated) for later Minecraft version, as this fork will not receive further update.

---

A Fabric fork version of [Loot Beams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-beams) (for Forge)

A 1.18.2 Fabric __client-side__ Minecraft mod that adds colorful and customizable loot beams to dropped items!


Loot Beams are added to all items by default and they change colors depending on the items name. You can specify a whitelist/blacklist for Beams, color overrides, and even NBT tags to change their color! (like "lootbeams.color:"0xFFFFFF"").


Beams also have nametags that show up when looking at an item or crouching so you can see what an item is without even picking it up. This mod is client-side, meaning it will run on vanilla servers and forge servers that do not have this mod installed!
